data.name: InformationCollectBody
data.value: We collect the following types of information: Account information provided through Google or Microsoft OAuth authentication, including your name and email address. Business data you enter into the platform, such as customer records, rental transactions, vehicle information, and financial data. Document images uploaded for OCR processing, including passport and driver's license scans. Usage data such as login times, features accessed, and device information. Cookies and similar technologies for session management and analytics.

data.name: LegalBasisBody
data.value: Under Malaysia's Personal Data Protection Act 2010 (Act 709), we process your personal data based on the following legal grounds: contract performance to provide and maintain our SaaS platform services, consent for optional features such as document OCR scanning and marketing communications, and legitimate interests for improving our services, fraud prevention, and platform security.

data.name: HowWeUseBody
data.value: We use your information to provide and maintain the MotoRent platform, process rental transactions and generate business reports, perform document OCR scanning when you upload identity documents, communicate with you about your account and service updates, improve our platform and develop new features, and comply with legal obligations under Malaysian law.

data.name: DataSharingBody
data.value: We share your data with the following third parties only as necessary to provide our services: Google and Microsoft for OAuth authentication services. Google Gemini API for document OCR processing of uploaded identity documents. Cloud infrastructure providers for secure data hosting and storage. Payment processors for subscription billing. We do not sell your personal data to any third party.

data.name: CrossBorderBody
data.value: Some of our service providers operate outside of Malaysia. When your data is transferred internationally, we implement appropriate safeguards, contractual protections, and security measures consistent with the Personal Data Protection Act 2010.

data.name: DataRetentionBody
data.value: We retain your personal data for as long as your account is active or as needed to provide our services. Business data is retained throughout your subscription period. After account termination, we retain your data for 90 days to allow for reactivation or data export. After this period, data may be permanently deleted. We may retain certain data longer if required by Malaysian law for accounting, tax, or legal compliance purposes.

data.name: YourRightsBody
data.value: Under Malaysia's Personal Data Protection Act 2010, you may request access to your personal data, correction of inaccurate data, withdrawal of consent where processing is consent-based, and other rights available under applicable law. To exercise these rights, please contact our Data Protection Officer at dpo@motorent.app. If you are not satisfied with our response, you may contact the Department of Personal Data Protection (Jabatan Perlindungan Data Peribadi, JPDP) in Malaysia.

data.name: CookiesBody
data.value: We use essential cookies for authentication and session management. We may also use analytics cookies to understand how you use our platform and improve our services. You can manage your cookie preferences through your browser settings. Essential cookies cannot be disabled as they are necessary for the platform to function.

data.name: DataSecurityBody
data.value: We implement industry-standard security measures to protect your data, including encryption in transit and at rest, secure access controls, regular security assessments, and automated backup systems. While we take all reasonable precautions, no method of electronic transmission or storage is completely secure.

data.name: ChangesBody
data.value: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time to reflect changes in our practices or applicable laws. We will notify you of any material changes via email or through a notice on our platform. Your continued use of MotoRent after such changes constitutes your acceptance of the updated policy.

data.name: ContactDpoBody
data.value: For any questions about this Privacy Policy or to exercise your data protection rights, please contact our Data Protection Officer at dpo@motorent.app. You may also contact us through the contact form on our website or write to us at our registered office address. If you are not satisfied with our response, you may contact the Department of Personal Data Protection (Jabatan Perlindungan Data Peribadi, JPDP) in Malaysia.
